description: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX on a column with NO uniqueness fact must not certify. Capping downgrades the would-be PASS to WARN and the remediation must name the resolving command (RFC §7.4). CR-T15: this is RS-INDEX-010's capped branch, which had no corpus case at all — before this, resolve_contains was asserted only on RS-DATA cases, so the 'here is how to turn this WARN into a PASS' promise was unverified for the entire RS-INDEX family. RS-INDEX-001 is declared alongside it because the index is built non-concurrently (CONCURRENTLY cannot run inside the transaction the capture applies the migration in).
